page_content:
Formerly: FILM362.

SLLC368 Special Topics in Film Studies | (3 Credits)

Content varies. Exploration of topics in film studies beyond national traditions, for example through the lens of theory, genre, auteurship, aesthetic movements in cinema, and/or comparative perspectives.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

SLLC369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
